name: Banana Curry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F and prepare pans.
2. Sift flour and baking powder into a bowl, then stir in bran until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, melt butter and mix with curry powder.
4. Add treacle (or golden syrup) and condensed milk to the melted butter mixture.
5. Dissolve baking soda in milk and pour it into the dry ingredients with the butter mixture and mashed bananas.
6. Stir until just combined.
7. Spoon batter into prepared muffin pans.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until well risen and golden.
9. Makes 16-18 muffins.
Microwave Instructions:
1. Place paper muffin cases in a microwave-safe muffin tray, filling each one about halfway.
2. Microwave on high power for 2 1/2 to 3 minutes, or until no wet spots are visible.
3. Repeat with remaining mixture. For microwave ovens without a rotating turntable, give the tray a quarter turn halfway through cooking.
